subject: docs: refresh session notes, TODO, testing guide post-theme-picker
body:
The 4-day branch shipped six tasks (theme plumbing → semantic-token
migration → audit fixes → burger menu → theme picker). Docs caught up:

- SESSION_NOTES.md: full rewrite. Lists every sub-task chronologically,
  current state of build/lint, key context for the next session
  (storage schema is now 2-key, hex duplication is documented and
  expected, manual browser verification is the outstanding gate).
- TODO.md: drop done Chunks 8 (UI theme toggle) + 9 (DaisyUI semantic
  migration) — both shipped this branch. Refine former Chunk 10
  (auto-generated hex script) with concrete steps + escalation criterion
  ("worth the effort once we have 3+ combos"). Add a checklist for the
  next person adding a 2nd combo (5 places need updating, including the
  unavoidable inline-bootstrap mirror).
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: two new scenarios under the Theme section — Burger
  Menu Toggle (keyboard nav + keepOpen + Escape behavior) and Picker
  Cross-tab Combo Sync (verifies the useActiveCombo MutationObserver +
  storage event handle the case once ≥ 2 combos exist).

No code changes. Builds, lint pass.

Tags: docs, session-notes, testing
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-picker
Semver: patch
title: refresh session notes, TODO, testing guide post-theme-picker
